## The {admiral} Quiz

Did you know that the `{admiral}` logo is inspired from the [Red Admiral](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vanessa_atalanta), 
which is a species of butterfly? Test your knowledge with this butterfly quiz before flying away!

**Question 1: Yes, "Red Admiral" is a species of butterfly… but what is its scientific name?**

  A) *Danaus plexippus*

  B) *Vanessa atalanta*

  C) *Papilio machaon*

  D) *Limenitis archippus*


**Question 2: Red Admirals belong to the family Nymphalidae. What is a unique physical characteristic of this family that sets them apart from others?**

  A) They have no antennae

  B) They are completely silent when flying

  C) They appear to have only 4 legs instead of 6

  D) They lack a proboscis

**Question 3: Most people know caterpillars eat leaves, but the Red Admiral caterpillar is picky. What is its primary host plant?**

  A) Stinging nettles

  B) Milkweed

  C) Oak leaves

  D) Parsley

---

<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br>
*(Scroll down for answers)*
<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br>

## Quiz Answers

  **Question 1:** B) *Vanessa atalanta*
  
  **Question 2:** C) They appear to have only 4 legs instead of 6
  
  **Question 3:** A) Stinging nettles
